code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut neg = false
  mut cur = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_space
      if in_num
        if neg
          product = product * (-cur)
        else
          product = product * cur
        end
        in_num = false
        neg = false
        cur = 0
      end
    else
      if not in_num and b == 45
        neg = true
        in_num = true
      else if not in_num and b == 43
        in_num = true
      else
        in_num = true
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if neg
      product = product * (-cur)
    else
      product = product * cur
    end
  end
  print("product=#{product}")
end
